TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan Di-pung pisingkiwan tu cung-yi-yen 2026ŚĻīśó•śú¨ÁúĺŤ≠įťôĘťĀłŤąČ == saklima a bataan idaw ku cacay a cie pisingkiwan tu giing itida tu tuseptunem mihcaan tu bulad wal demiad sikawaw, misumad misingkiw tu Cung-yi-yen hamin han makaala tu sipnemlim a tademawan, masaniyadu'niyadu' ku sasingkiwan maladayhiw. ayda nu nipisingkiwan han caay kaw i kasienawan a sikawaw tina nipisingkiwan, i ayaw nu pisingkiwan han itida i caysiwsiwsep mihcaan nu pisingkiwanÔľõaydahan pisingkiwan nu Ce-cen-ten ce-min-ten atu Dipun Wi-sin-huy itida i tuseptulin mihcaan caysep bulad patideng tu Lein-he sihu nu sayaway nu kuo-cen pisingkiwan, Ce-min-ten Kaw-se-cen-cin tu sapatanektek nu sapacukelan a nisimsim, sisa itini a misingkiw mikaysang tu Cung-yi-yen . Á¨¨51 . sakakaay a mililiday nu Dipun makaala ku Ce-min-ten itida tu kalingatuan itida i caysiwlimlim mihcaan u satabakiay nu makaciay anikilukan, Ce-min-ten lucaynem a tademawan itin i baluhay nu giingan sacacaysa a micidek ku nikaalaan, nu Ce-wi-ce-cen-lein-mung pulung han lulimnem ku tademaw, hatida nu 4/3 ku tademaw. Ce-min-ten milauyt tu tusepsepsiw nu mihcaan nipisingkiwan mikaci tu Mi-cu-ten tu lusepwal nu tademawan, nikudan nu nikalepacawan nu Dipung tu cacayay nu cen-tangan u sayadahay a nikilukan, sayaway nu cen-ten tu 3/2 ku tademaw. malasakakaay nu kanatal ci Kaw-se, kanahatu misuayaw tu Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo a sakay hekal nu kanatalan dawmi' kya wayway, nika caay henay katenes itida i Cung-yi-yen idaw ku sakay hitayan nu nipiliclican a kawawan, iday sayaway nu idaway tu sakakaay misuayaw tu " idaw ku kawaw tu Taywan" muhelak a musakamu, makai makatengil kina Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo tina kawawan sisa idaw ku sapaculi nuheni tu sakaykanatalan, nika penecen nu Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo paculi tu kina Dipun, sisa itini ci Kaw-se katuud ku pacukelay ci nidaan kasenu sa a macakat ku nika singangan nida. Cung-yi-yen pulung han sipnemlim a tademawan, sapisingkiw u pin-li-ce hananay. duma tuwalsiw a tademawan u masacacayay a niyadu'an masasuala tu yadahay nu nipisingkiwanÔľõcaypicnem a tademawan nu sabaw cacay a pasintuan ku dadayhiwan a niyadu'an, u Cen-teng nu nganganan tu dayhiwan ku sapakakenisan. . anu pisingkiwan nu masacacayay nu niyaduan anu mademec satu, kanahatu caay kaala u pasintu kuhan sa mamaala tu cinida sa, anu idaw ku mikutayay tu masacacayay nu niyadu'an kanaha tu caay pakaala tu 10%, acaay kaala malahuosinzin. . patupaan śäēÁ•®Áéá pisingkiwan a demiad yadah ku kasisuledaan nu niyadu', yu sumamad pisingkiwan makaala tu 26.07%, u sakay Dipun nu kanatalan tu sapikaka tu sumamaday itida i tusepsepsip nu mihcaan tu satalakaway. nu pisingkiwan han makaala tu 56.26%, mikikaka tu nuayawan 2.41%. saan ku nipisingkiw, atu Ce-min-ten tu kapenecan a nikakademecan, mapalawlaw ku Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo atu duma nu kanatal atu tademaw misuayaw tu Kaw sihu hakiya micaliw tu sapicuduh misumad tu sakasiwa nu hulicaan tu nikabiyalawan. Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo saan ku sakayhekalan musakamuay ci Lin-cin, nipisingkiwan tu nikasilahecian idaw ku sananay tu Dipun " makalabu, sakay dangdang nu kawaw a bungday atu nisimsiman, kakaydaan, kawaw", patalaw tu Dipun amana pitukuaca ku hitay tu naayaway a kawawan. Cung-kun Cung-yen Tay-wan mikuliay mucili tu " Lay-ci-de an" mipalihalay ci Kaw-se-caw-meaw idaw ku sakalahecian. .
S.PHON: == tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan di-puŇč pisiŇčkiwan tu ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn ************ == sakr~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a ¶i…ô pisiŇčkiwan tu giiŇč itida tu tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan tu bur~…ĺad war~…ĺ d…ômiad sikawaw, misumad misiŇčkiw tu ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn ńßamin ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu sipn…ômr~…ĺim a tad…ômawan, masanijadu Ē~ °nijadu Ē~ ° ku sasiŇčkiwan mar~…ĺadajńßiw. ajda nu nipisiŇčkiwan ńßan ¶aaj kaw i kasi…ônawan a sikawaw tina nipisiŇčkiwan, i ajaw nu pisiŇčkiwan ńßan itida i ¶ajsiwsiws…ôp mińß ¶aan nu pisiŇčkiwan*ajdańßan pisiŇčkiwan nu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn-t…ôn ¶…ô-min-t…ôn atu dipun wi-sin-ńßuj itida i tus…ôptur~…ĺin mińß ¶aan ¶ajs…ôp bur~…ĺad patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô sińßu nu sajawaj nu kuo- ¶…ôn pisiŇčkiwan, ¶…ô-min-t…ôn kaw-s…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in tu sapatan…ôkt…ôk nu sapa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺan a nisimsim, sisa itini a misiŇčkiw mikajsaŇč tu ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn . *** . sakakaaj a mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu dipun makaar~…ĺa ku ¶…ô-min-t…ôn itida tu kar~…ĺiŇčatuan itida i ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan u satabakiaj nu maka ¶iaj anikir~…ĺukan, ¶…ô-min-t…ôn r~…ĺu ¶ajn…ôm a tad…ômawan itin i bar~…ĺuńßaj nu giiŇčan sa ¶a ¶ajsa a mi ¶id…ôk ku nikaar~…ĺaan, nu ¶…ô-wi- ¶…ô- ¶…ôn-r~…ĺ…ôin-muŇč pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan r~…ĺur~…ĺimn…ôm ku tad…ômaw, ńßatida nu */* ku tad…ômaw. ¶…ô-min-t…ôn mir~…ĺaujt tu tus…ôps…ôpsiw nu mińß ¶aan nipisiŇčkiwan mika ¶i tu mi- ¶u-t…ôn tu r~…ĺus…ôpwar~…ĺ nu tad…ômawan, nikudan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu dipuŇč tu ¶a ¶ajaj nu ¶…ôn-taŇčan u sajadańßaj a nikir~…ĺukan, sajawaj nu ¶…ôn-t…ôn tu */* ku tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺasakakaaj nu kanatar~…ĺ ¶i kaw-s…ô, kanańßatu misuajaw tu ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kanatar~…ĺan dawmi Ē~ ° kja wajwaj, nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kat…ôn…ôs itida i ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn idaw ku sakaj ńßitajan nu nipir~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶an a kawawan, idaj sajawaj nu idawaj tu sakakaaj misuajaw tu " idaw ku kawaw tu tajwan" muńß…ôr~…ĺak a musakamu, makai makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ kina ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo tina kawawan sisa idaw ku sapa ¶ur~…ĺi nuńß…ôni tu sakajkanatar~…ĺan, nika p…ôn…ô ¶…ôn nu ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu kina dipun, sisa itini ¶i kaw-s…ô katuud ku pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺaj ¶i nidaan kas…ônu sa a ma ¶akat ku nika siŇčaŇčan nida. ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan sipn…ômr~…ĺim a tad…ômawan, sapisiŇčkiw u pin-r~…ĺi- ¶…ô ńßananaj. duma tuwar~…ĺsiw a tad…ômawan u masa ¶a ¶ajaj a nijadu Ē~ °an masasuar~…ĺa tu jadańßaj nu nipisiŇčkiwan* ¶ajpi ¶n…ôm a tad…ômawan nu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a pasintuan ku dadajńßiwan a nijadu Ē~ °an, u ¶…ôn-t…ôŇč nu ŇčaŇčanan tu dajńßiwan ku sapakak…ônisan. . anu pisiŇčkiwan nu masa ¶a ¶ajaj nu nijaduan anu mad…ôm…ô ¶ satu, kanańßatu ¶aaj kaar~…ĺa u pasintu kuńßan sa mamaar~…ĺa tu ¶inida sa, anu idaw ku mikutajaj tu masa ¶a ¶ajaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an kanańßa tu ¶aaj pakaar~…ĺa tu **%, a ¶aaj kaar~…ĺa mar~…ĺańßuosinzin. . patupaan *** pisiŇčkiwan a d…ômiad jadańß ku kasisur~…ĺ…ôdaan nu nijadu Ē~ °, ju sumamad pisiŇčkiwan makaar~…ĺa tu **.**%, u sakaj dipun nu kanatar~…ĺan tu sapikaka tu sumamadaj itida i tus…ôps…ôpsip nu mińß ¶aan tu satar~…ĺakawaj. nu pisiŇčkiwan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu **.**%, mikikaka tu nuajawan *.**%. saan ku nipisiŇčkiw, atu ¶…ô-min-t…ôn tu kap…ôn…ô ¶an a nikakad…ôm…ô ¶an, mapar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo atu duma nu kanatar~…ĺ atu tad…ômaw misuajaw tu kaw sińßu ńßakija mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu sapi ¶uduńß misumad tu sakasiwa nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶aan tu nikabijar~…ĺawan. ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo saan ku sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan musakamuaj ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶in, nipisiŇčkiwan tu nikasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian idaw ku sananaj tu dipun " makar~…ĺabu, sakaj daŇčdaŇč nu kawaw a buŇčdaj atu nisimsiman, kakajdaan, kawaw", patar~…ĺaw tu dipun amana pitukua ¶a ku ńßitaj tu naajawaj a kawawan. ¶uŇč-kun ¶uŇč-j…ôn taj-wan mikur~…ĺiaj mu ¶ir~…ĺi tu " r~…ĺaj- ¶i-d…ô an" mipar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôaw idaw ku sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian. .
S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan Di-pung pisingkiwan tu cung-yi-yen 2026ŚĻīśó•śú¨ÁúĺŤ≠įťôĘťĀłŤąČ == saklima a bataan idaw ku cacay a cie pisingkiwan tu giing itida tu tuseptunem mihcaan tu bulad wal demiad sikawaw, misumad misingkiw tu Cung-yi-yen hamin han makaala tu sipnemlim a tademawan, masaniyadu'niyadu' ku sasingkiwan maladayhiw. ayda nu nipisingkiwan han caay kaw i kasienawan a sikawaw tina nipisingkiwan, i ayaw nu pisingkiwan han itida i caysiwsiwsep mihcaan nu pisingkiwanÔľõaydahan pisingkiwan nu Ce-cen-ten ce-min-ten atu Dipun Wi-sin-huy itida i tuseptulin mihcaan caysep bulad patideng tu Lein-he sihu nu sayaway nu kuo-cen pisingkiwan, Ce-min-ten Kaw-se-cen-cin tu sapatanektek nu sapacukelan a nisimsim, sisa itini a misingkiw mikaysang tu Cung-yi-yen . Á¨¨51 . sakakaay a mililiday nu Dipun makaala ku Ce-min-ten itida tu kalingatuan itida i caysiwlimlim mihcaan u satabakiay nu makaciay anikilukan, Ce-min-ten lucaynem a tademawan itin i baluhay nu giingan sacacaysa a micidek ku nikaalaan, nu Ce-wi-ce-cen-lein-mung pulung han lulimnem ku tademaw, hatida nu 4/3 ku tademaw. Ce-min-ten milauyt tu tusepsepsiw nu mihcaan nipisingkiwan mikaci tu Mi-cu-ten tu lusepwal nu tademawan, nikudan nu nikalepacawan nu Dipung tu cacayay nu cen-tangan u sayadahay a nikilukan, sayaway nu cen-ten tu 3/2 ku tademaw. malasakakaay nu kanatal ci Kaw-se, kanahatu misuayaw tu Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo a sakay hekal nu kanatalan dawmi' kya wayway, nika caay henay katenes itida i Cung-yi-yen idaw ku sakay hitayan nu nipiliclican a kawawan, iday sayaway nu idaway tu sakakaay misuayaw tu " idaw ku kawaw tu Taywan" muhelak a musakamu, makai makatengil kina Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo tina kawawan sisa idaw ku sapaculi nuheni tu sakaykanatalan, nika penecen nu Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo paculi tu kina Dipun, sisa itini ci Kaw-se katuud ku pacukelay ci nidaan kasenu sa a macakat ku nika singangan nida. Cung-yi-yen pulung han sipnemlim a tademawan, sapisingkiw u pin-li-ce hananay. duma tuwalsiw a tademawan u masacacayay a niyadu'an masasuala tu yadahay nu nipisingkiwanÔľõcaypicnem a tademawan nu sabaw cacay a pasintuan ku dadayhiwan a niyadu'an, u Cen-teng nu nganganan tu dayhiwan ku sapakakenisan. . anu pisingkiwan nu masacacayay nu niyaduan anu mademec satu, kanahatu caay kaala u pasintu kuhan sa mamaala tu cinida sa, anu idaw ku mikutayay tu masacacayay nu niyadu'an kanaha tu caay pakaala tu 10%, acaay kaala malahuosinzin. . patupaan śäēÁ•®Áéá pisingkiwan a demiad yadah ku kasisuledaan nu niyadu', yu sumamad pisingkiwan makaala tu 26.07%, u sakay Dipun nu kanatalan tu sapikaka tu sumamaday itida i tusepsepsip nu mihcaan tu satalakaway. nu pisingkiwan han makaala tu 56.26%, mikikaka tu nuayawan 2.41%. saan ku nipisingkiw, atu Ce-min-ten tu kapenecan a nikakademecan, mapalawlaw ku Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo atu duma nu kanatal atu tademaw misuayaw tu Kaw sihu hakiya micaliw tu sapicuduh misumad tu sakasiwa nu hulicaan tu nikabiyalawan. Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo saan ku sakayhekalan musakamuay ci Lin-cin, nipisingkiwan tu nikasilahecian idaw ku sananay tu Dipun " makalabu, sakay dangdang nu kawaw a bungday atu nisimsiman, kakaydaan, kawaw", patalaw tu Dipun amana pitukuaca ku hitay tu naayaway a kawawan. Cung-kun Cung-yen Tay-wan mikuliay mucili tu " Lay-ci-de an" mipalihalay ci Kaw-se-caw-meaw idaw ku sakalahecian. .

war~…ĺ d…ômiad sikawaw, misumad misiŇčkiw tu ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn ńßamin ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu sipn…ômr~…ĺim a tad…ômawan, masanijadu Ē~ °nijadu Ē~ ° ku sasiŇčkiwan mar~…ĺadajńßiw. ajda nu nipisiŇčkiwan ńßan ¶aaj kaw i kasi…ônawan a sikawaw tina nipisiŇčkiwan, i ajaw nu pisiŇčkiwan ńßan itida i ¶ajsiwsiws…ôp mińß ¶aan nu pisiŇčkiwan*ajdańßan pisiŇčkiwan nu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn-t…ôn ¶…ô-min-t…ôn atu dipun wi-sin-ńßuj nisimsim, sisa itini a misiŇčkiw mikajsaŇč tu ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn . *** . sakakaaj a mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu dipun makaar~…ĺa ku ¶…ô-min-t…ôn itida tu kar~…ĺiŇčatuan itida i ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan u ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kanatar~…ĺan dawmi Ē~ ° kja wajwaj, nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kat…ôn…ôs itida i ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn idaw ku sakaj ńßitajan nu nipir~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶an a kawawan, idaj sajawaj nu idawaj tu sakakaaj misuajaw tu " idaw ku kawaw tu tajwan" muńß…ôr~…ĺak a musakamu, makai makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ kina ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo tina kawawan sisa idaw ku sapa ¶ur~…ĺi sumamadaj itida i tus…ôps…ôpsip nu mińß ¶aan tu satar~…ĺakawaj. nu pisiŇčkiwan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu **.**%, mikikaka tu nuajawan *.**%. saan ku nipisiŇčkiw, atu ¶…ô-min-t…ôn tu kap…ôn…ô ¶an a nikakad…ôm…ô ¶an, mapar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo atu duma nu kanatar~…ĺ atu tad…ômaw misuajaw tu kaw sińßu ńßakija mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu sapi ¶uduńß misumad tu sakasiwa nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶aan tu nikabijar~…ĺawan. ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo saan ku sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan musakamuaj ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶in, nipisiŇčkiwan tu nikasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian idaw ku sananaj tu dipun " makar~…ĺabu, sakaj daŇčdaŇč nu kawaw a buŇčdaj atu nisimsiman, kakajdaan, kawaw", patar~…ĺaw tu dipun amana pitukua ¶a ku ńßitaj tu naajawaj a kawawan. ¶uŇč-kun ¶uŇč-j…ôn taj-wan mikur~…ĺiaj mu ¶ir~…ĺi tu " r~…ĺaj- ¶i-d…ô an" mipar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôaw idaw ku sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian. .
